title: Who exactly is the bad guy in EoE
display_title: Who exactly is the bad guy in EoE
wikitext:
[]: Who exactly is the bad guy in EoE ?             Quote Post by Bobathon » Tue Jul 19, 2005 4:32 pm Well, I really didn't know. At first I thought it was SEELE, but really um... im not too sure whos the real bad guy... is it Shinji vs himself... or what ?

[]: Re: Who exactly is the bad guy in EoE ?             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Jul 19, 2005 4:36 pm Bobathon wrote: Well, I really didn't know. At first I thought it was SEELE, but really um... im not too sure whos the real bad guy... is it Shinji vs himself... or what ?

[]:             Quote Post by Bobathon » Tue Jul 19, 2005 4:38 pm so youre saying... the hero all this time was actually the bad guy ? o_O... "pulls hair and screams like an idiot"

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Tue Jul 19, 2005 4:38 pm Of course, there are bound to be some people that sees SEELE as heroes, and 3I did help a lot in regards of the characters. I think that there aren't any "bad guys" in Evangelion, only different kinds of weirdos.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Jul 19, 2005 4:53 pm Bobathon wrote: so youre saying... the hero all this time was actually the bad guy ? o_O... "pulls hair and screams like an idiot"

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Tue Jul 19, 2005 4:56 pm But it's also Shinji who stops it... <.< >.>

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Tue Jul 19, 2005 5:54 pm I'm going with there is no bad guy.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Jul 19, 2005 6:48 pm the term bad guy is far too black and white for something like evangelion. the people that would most closely fit this would, however, be the chairmen of SEELE

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Jul 19, 2005 7:17 pm Evangelions characters are a lot like real life people so I don't really think you could really call any of them "bad guys" seele and gendo probably come closest, but even they have realistic motivations and don't fit the bill as traditional badguys.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Tue Jul 19, 2005 7:51 pm Defectron wrote: Evangelions characters are a lot like real life people so I don't really think you could really call any of them "bad guys" seele and gendo probably come closest, but even they have realistic motivations and don't fit the bill as traditional badguys.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Jul 19, 2005 7:55 pm Its best to think of eva characters as " human " rather then good or evil.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Jul 19, 2005 8:10 pm Well, I really didn't know. At first I thought it was SEELE, but really um... im not too sure whos the real bad guy... is it Shinji vs himself... or what ?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Jul 19, 2005 8:51 pm The bad guy is Depression. Our hero is Hope. Fatalism and Struggle play supporting roles. Angst is up for an Emmy. Reason was edited out in the final cut.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Tue Jul 19, 2005 8:58 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: The bad guy is Depression. Our hero is Hope. Fatalism and Struggle play supporting roles. Angst is up for an Emmy.

[]:             Quote Post by Crazy_Beserker » Wed Jul 20, 2005 1:26 am I dont really think there are any bad guys...its more like politics in our world today...different factions think there doing to right thing for everyone involved...example here would be terrorists...they think there doing the right thing thats why they have people willing to fight for their cause...then you have those who disagree which makes the other faction trying to stop them for reasons such as freedom, democracy bla bla bla...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 20, 2005 2:01 am "IF YOU'RE NOT WITH ME, THEN YOU'RE MY ENEMY!!!!"

[]:             Quote Post by Crazy_Beserker » Wed Jul 20, 2005 2:22 am Reichu wrote: "IF YOU'RE NOT WITH ME, THEN YOU'RE MY ENEMY!!!!"

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Wed Jul 20, 2005 7:49 am Wait a minute... It seems like there IS a bad guy of Evangelion after all.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 20, 2005 9:35 am Pen^3 is rather tall for a hot springs penguin.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Jul 20, 2005 10:21 am Reichu wrote: Pen^3 is rather tall for a hot springs penguin.
